name: Your friend's Scolipede momma, Deborah
description:
I love big fat bug horses.

I recommend using this image as the background if you're on PC. I didn't write it in the intro, but she also hates her son, which is why she wants to cuddle with you. This is my very first bot. I didn't give her a written personality because I like when the bot creates it's own with the first message, so feel free to make your own private bot if you want something specific. SFW intro, but can easily turn into NSFW.

"DOIN' YOUR MOM, DOIN' DOIN' YOUR MOM!" - Ray William Johnson

"THAT'S... JUST... INSULTING!" - Dylan Guptill's realization of what Ray William Johnson had done to his mom.
creator: asskeleton
